llm_advice.rationale: Baseline ATen reference shows bottleneck is multiple GEMM and add launches. Keeping cuBLAS for the large W@X matmul and fusing the rank-16 update (B.T@X then A@...) into a single custom kernel will reduce launch overhead and improve memory locality. Start with a simple fused kernel, then explore vectorized loads/stores and shared memory tiling to maximize bandwidth utilization.
risk_controls: always keep cuBLAS for W @ X
validate correctness against baseline for all d in [3584, 4096, 4608]
use runtime shape dispatch, never hardcode d
static review for memory safety and launch bounds
stop_conditions: three consecutive candidates with no improvement

notes: Use ATen/cuBLAS for the d x d GEMM.
Explore kernels that fuse Y += A @ T for rank 16.
